title: LLM Academy
description: Free, self-paced continuing education on working effectively and safely with large language models.

courses.title: Foundations of Executor-Agnostic Workflows
courses.description: Learn to break work into contracts that any human or model can execute in parallel, safely, using Inversion of Control, Dependency Injection, and the Unit of Work pattern.

courses.title: Applied Probability for LLM Verification
courses.description: Statistics for not getting bamboozled by the robot. Build the probabilistic intuition you need to know when to trust an LLM, when to verify, and how hard.
